ab: minusa’ kuwing tinqalangan maskakaru’ ki yutas cuhisa’.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: ingsu cami cubalay ini’ pakitaal la, lungulungun mu cubalay hiya’.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: talan kuwing ni yutas ru paqaniqan kuwing niya’ cu bahat, panubuwan kuwing niya’ cu cha(外來語-客).
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: lalbing cubalay ku pinumuwa’ ni yutas ka bahat, sahahiya’ cubalay i niqun.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: balayq mu uwi ku cha ni yutas, balayq uwi i nubun.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: pakuriax laga, gumlu kuwing i tumahuk cu kakriaxun ki yaki’.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: payux cubalay ku tinahuk ni yaki’, kiya a quleh, waylung, rilum ru aang na apit.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有飛鼠湯。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and flying squirrel soup.

ab: kumnuriax laru’, musa’ cami kumiku’ cu paruxaw i papmuwaan cu paparuxaw.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: payux inagal ni yaki’ ka bunga’, cayi’ ru qinu, sipaaras kuwing niya’ muwah imuwag.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: mapugagay cami ga, kalun mu maha wahay cimu mitaal lawwi i babaw niya’.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
